_comment: Per-model comparison config. Sampling params omitted where model defaults are correct — only override resolution, seed, and params that differ from defaults.

cases.prompt: A futuristic cyberpunk city at night, neon lights reflecting on wet streets

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

default.description: Best known vLLM-Omni command for aligned non-cache benchmark runs.
default.notes: Uses env-selected FlashAttention; torch compile is disabled by the benchmark harness.

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

h100-h200-2gpu.description: H100/H200 command for the Wan2.2 TI2V 5B 704p case.
h100-h200-2gpu.notes: Keep DiT resident on high-memory GPUs to avoid CPU offload in performance runs.

report_framework_reasons.vllm-omni: Server log shows TypeError: LTX2TextConnectors.forward() got an unexpected keyword argument 'additive_mask'.

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

h200-2gpu.description: H200 command for the LTX2 two-stage 121-frame case.
h200-2gpu.notes: Resident mode keeps both stages in VRAM on H200-class GPUs.

default.description: Best known vLLM-Omni command for the LTX-2 two-stage 2-GPU case.
default.notes: Uses diffusion CFG parallelism and env-selected FlashAttention; no torch compile or cache path.

default.description: LightX2V upstream LTX-2 t2av path for the LTX-2 121-frame case.
default.notes: Uses upstream LTX-2 audio-video t2av runner with CFG parallelism; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

h200-2gpu.notes: Matches upstream scripts/ltx2/run_ltx2_t2av_cfg_parallel.sh semantics with compile disabled by the benchmark harness.

h100-1gpu.description: H100 LightX2V LTX-2 t2av block-offload command/config.
h100-1gpu.notes: Uses upstream block offload because TP keeps Gemma and one DiT shard resident on rank0 and OOMs on H100 80GB.

cases.prompt: A cat and a dog baking a cake together in a kitchen.

report_framework_reasons.vllm-omni: No compatible vLLM-Omni LTX2.3 serving profile is configured.

default.description: Fallback SGLang command when no hardware-specific profile matches.
default.notes: Use hardware-specific profiles for formal H100/H200 runs.

h100-80gb-2gpu.description: Cookbook-aligned H100 80GB command for the LTX2.3 two-stage 121-frame case.
h100-80gb-2gpu.notes: Snapshot mode avoids H100 resident VRAM pressure.

h200-2gpu.description: Cookbook-aligned H200 command for the LTX2.3 two-stage 121-frame case.
h200-2gpu.notes: Resident mode is the fastest LTX2.3 two-stage path when both DiTs fit in VRAM.

official-original-2gpu.description: Official stage-switching semantics profile for LTX2.3 two-stage comparisons.
official-original-2gpu.notes: Use this only when official switching semantics are more important than latency.

default.description: LightX2V upstream LTX-2.3 t2av path for the LTX-2.3 121-frame case.
default.notes: Uses upstream LTX-2.3 audio-video runner. CFG parallel is not enabled because upstream mm_guider and cfg_parallel are not compatible.

h200-2gpu-tp.description: H200 same-GPU LightX2V LTX-2.3 t2av tensor-parallel command/config.
h200-2gpu-tp.notes: Use tensor parallelism for same-GPU comparison because upstream mm_guider raises when combined with cfg_parallel.

h200-1gpu.notes: Single-GPU profile follows current upstream LTX-2.3 scripts; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

h100-1gpu.description: H100 LightX2V LTX-2.3 t2av block-offload command/config.
h100-1gpu.notes: Best attempted H100 server profile. Upstream ltx2_3_offload and this full Gemma/VAE offload path still OOM after warmup on 80GB GPUs.

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
